The first of his
race. An almighty
stone dragon with 
immense defense
capabilities

name: Thousand Dragon
description:
A dragon that
has grown and
developed over
thousands of years

Whoever gets
pronounced guilty.
This dragon will look
into their past in
order to judge
them before they
get sentenced

name: Punishment Dragon

Whoever gets
sentenced gets
thrown into
the region where
this dragon lives
in order to fight for
the rest of their life.

A dragon that 
dwells in the sea.
It is capable of
spitting high
pressure blasts
of water.

A legendary
dragon called
timaeus came
for help in order
to beat the
leviathan

Harpies have
raised this
dragon in order
to fight with them.

The more his
blue body parts
start glowing the
stronger he gets.

After being seduced
by the cosmos, he
has acquired the
ability to absorb the
flying particles in
the universe in order
to become stronger

Many fairies call
him the very first

order to learn from him

Many fairies

their savior.
They pray to

trouble occurs.

She once was
under the apprentice

magician. After
many years she

mage herself.

After years upon
years of studying
the dark arts of
magic, she
became crazy.

An alternate
form of the
legendary dark
magician. He
chose to learn
the dark arts of magic

name: Dark Magician

After years upon
years of studying
magic, the dark
magician became
so strong he has
become something
different entirely.

An alternate
form of the dark
magician. He
chose to specialize
in melee combat
instead of magic.

A magician
who has
specialized
in the dark
arts of magic.

After a human has
been tortured in hell

begins to torture
souls himself in order
to avoid the torture to him.
In the process, he slowly
loses his humanity.

description:
After many years
of him torturing
souls in hell and
losing humanity

he became a demon.

name: Endymion

After years upon
years of studying
the dark arts of magic,
the magician of black
chaos became so
strong he has
become something
different entirely.

There is electricity
circling deep
inside of his bones
he can bend in
order to create a
powerful attack.

name: Skull Archfiend Of Lightning

A demon who
has mastered
the art of bending
electricity.

A Powerful invoker
who can create huge
armies of undead
warriors.

name: Mystical Knight Of Jackal

Evil spirit whos
purpose is to
protect the
fallen soldiers
of egypt

While fighting
as a magician
for the legendary
dark magician he
turned sides after
he got almost killed
by the lord of the 
vampires.

The alpha of
all vampires. He
started creating
the vampire bloodline
by turning people.

fragile-looking
skeleton warrior

its swift and
precise attacks.

conducted
several rituals

weapons and magic.

much to learn in
order to ascend.

This samurai was
the first human

five souls who got
turned are named

Between the little
elf and his lizard

strong bond.

Even after life
itself, the bond
between this
little elf and his
lizard prevails.

a doctor who saved
a human's life by

a face upon his 
chest

he summons un-
dead creatures
who fight at his
side

An ancient dragon 
who is cursed of 
beeing immortal

name: Berserker Dragon

Whenever there
are imbalances
in the world
created by strong
fiends trying to take
over the world,
this knight and his
soldiers will rise.

whose horse
travels faster
than the wind

After Gaia almost
died in the fight
against the
leviathans, fairies
found him and
helped him not only
survive but make
him stronger.

A legendary 
dragon rider and
one of the heads
of the gaia family

Even though
he is stronger

of the beginning
himself, he second
in command
of the army.

essed by a vile

most weakest

head leaders

make them more

humans who chose

After many years

Since many

Since all fairies

side has.

Dark forces

Dark forces
increase the

zombies

Increases the

Boosts the power

This pendant

Increases the

Diabolic Force

that makes any
spellcaster into
something much
stronger

all opponent
Dragon monsters

There arent

However this is

The ultimate

A Dragon who

created a monster

In order to fight

evil, he gained

His soul long-since

He no longer resembles

A vicious crocodile

description:
An abomination
of dragons created
for the sole purpose
of destruction

name: Hamon, Lord Of Thunder
description:
An golden skeleton
like fiend which
is flowed through
by electricity

name: Raviel, Lord Of Phantasms
description:
A huge titan
summoned by
zera to protect
him at all cost

name: Uria, Lord Of Searing Flames
description:
His entire body
is flowed through
by magma that he
can transform into
flames

description:
One of three godly
creatures who once 
defeated the darkness
together with the help
of exodia

name: Slifer The Sky Dragon
description:
One of three godly
creatures who once 
defeated the darkness
together with the help
of exodia

name: The Winged Dragon Of Ra
description:
One of three godly
creatures who once 
defeated the darkness
together with the help
of exodia

name: The Dragon Destroyer
description:
A legendary
dragon slayer
who slayed over
thousands of
dragons

description:
A lone wolf raised
by a reckless
mercenary in 
order to become
a personal guard

name: Wall Shadow
description:
An unusually
fast monster
that sweeps
across walls 
to attack its 
enemies.

name: Big Koala
description:
A species of huge
des koala. He is
meek, but people
are afraid of him
because he is 
very powerful

name: Master Of Oz
description:
Huge koala 
in the land of
oz. Each step
he takes the
land starts 
to tremble

name: Ultimate Ancient Gear Golem
description:
A massive
beast whos
body completely
flowed by
electricity

name: Emissary Of Darkness
description:
He can create
fog around him
in order to make
him less visible
around enemies

name: Chimera The Flying Beast
description: A mythical\ncreature with\nincredable speed

name: Infernal Gainer
description: His entire back\nis full with spikes\nprotecting him

name: Stardust Dragon
description:
He charges wind
inside of his body.
Whenever he
releases a bundled
stream of wind onto
his enemies his chest
starts glowing.

name: Gravekeepers Commandant
description:
A deceptively
fragile-looking
spellcaster
that is known for
its swift and
precise attacks.

name: Dark-Eyes Illusionist
description:
Mysterious looking
puppeteer that
hypnotizes his
enemies

name: Relinquished
description: A monster controlled\nby the millenium eye

name: Thousand-Eyes Restrict
description:
Whoever looks
into his opened
eyes can not
move any longer

name: Archfiend Of Gilfer
description:
After many years
of evolution, this
fiend has become
one-third fiend,
one-third winged-beast,
and the last third dragon.

name: Torike
description:
This monster's
sharp horn gives
it an edge when
attacking.

name: Barox
description:
This creature flies
through the dark,
attacking its
enemies with its
long, hairy arms.

name: Takriminos
description: A finned creature\ndistantly related\nto sea Dragons.

name: Flame Cerebrus
description: A flaming beast\nthat is lethal\nto the touch.

name: Infernal Flame Emperor
description:
A monster
consisting
only of fire.
Everything he
touches, inflames.

name: Labyrinth Tank
description:
A tank that races
around a labyrinth
hunting down
its enemies.

name: Millennium Golem
description:
A golem that
has protected
treasure for
nearly a millennium.

name: The Creator
description: Resurrecting, thats\nthe whole purpose\nof his creation

name: Exxod, Master Of The Guard
description:
Slamming his fists
into each other
released a huge
burst of energy
capable of creating
either a shield for
protection or an
attack

name: Exodius The Forbidden Lord
description:
It guards
the dungeon
keeping the
millenium items.
He only obeys
to the royal
family of egypt

name: The Exodia Incarnate
description:
The evocation
of a silhouette
of exodia itself.

name: Exodia Necross
description:
Also known as
the black exodia,
an evil incarnation
of the exodia

name: Yamata Dragon
description: Many snakes\nbundled together\ninto one abomination.

name: Sensei Misaki
description: Legendary sword\nmaster and a veteran\nof over 100 battles.

name: Ogre of the Black Shadow
description:
An ogre possessed
by the powers of
the dark. Few
can withstand
its rapid charge.

name: Red Dragon Archfiend
description:
Most creatures con
nected to one side
after the war began.
The archfiends did
not.Their massive
power made it im
possible to forcefully
make them join

name: Red Dragon Archfiend Abyss
description:
The sheer will of
destruction this
beast has makes
it hard to control.
Mostly it is chained up, desperately waiting
for its release.

name: Red Nova Dragon
description:
Most archfiends
have the same
predecessor.
The only thing
that makes them
different is the
environment they
were born in.

name: Andro Sphinx
description:
A creature raised
by king Anubis.
Whenever he
needed assist
ance he created
three beasts out
of thin air.

name: Sphinx Teleia
description:
A creature raised
by king Anubis.
Whenever he
needed assist
ance he created
three beasts out
of thin air.

name: Theinen The Great Sphinx
description:
Whenever the
two serveants
of anubis were
not enough 
regarding their
power, they 
fused into this
abomination

name: Archfiend King Calamity
description:
After centuries of
evolving he became
more of a fiend rather
then a dragon.
This makes him
more capable of 
ruling the archfiends
then any other.

name: King Of The Skull Serveants
description:
He can create
thousands of
skull serveants

name: Paladin Of White Dragon
description:
This young warrior
has once found
a dragon egg which
hatched the moment
he wanted to destroy
it. After it hatched he
could not kill it any 
longer.

name: Blue-Eyes White Dragon
description:
An extremely
rare card with
unsurpassed
attack and
defense power.

name: Blue-Eyes White Dragon
description:
An extremely
rare card with
unsurpassed
attack and
defense power.

name: Time Wizard Of Tomorrow
description:
A sorcerer capable
of bending time to
his will. Though not
powerful at first
glance, appearances 
can be deceiving.

name: Stone Ogre Grotto
description: A rock giant\nconsisting of\nmassive boulders.

name: Bracchio-raidus
description:
A colossal dinosaur
that stomps
on anything
that wanders
into its path.

name: Frostosaurus
description:
The monsters
metabolism enables
it to endure long
periods of cold

name: Gungnir
description:
Some dragons
have adapted
in the ice age
in order to 
not only survive
but gain strenght 
from the cold

name: Trishula
description:
There are rumors
that the ice age
only has been
caused by one
mystic creature
who freezes
everything around
him to death.

name: Des Koala
description:
A koala pos
sessed by a
dark spirit giving
him mythic powers

name: Harpie Lady Sisters
description: Three fierce sisters\nwho relentlessly\nattack as a team.

name: B. Dragon Jungle King
description:
A jet-black dragon
that inhabits the
jungles and feeds
on trees.

name: Suijin
description:
A golem that uses
water attacks like
the Labyrinth
Brothers.

name: Firewing Pegasus
description:
A heavenly stallion
that flies
across the skies
on scarlet wings.

name: Mystical Sand
description: Turns enemies to\nstone and crushes\nthem to dust.

name: Queen of Autumn Leaves
description:
Queen of the
Tree Spirit
who is embraced
by brilliant
autumn leaves.

name: Pumpking, King of Ghosts
description:
This pumpkin king
strikes at its
enemies with its
long tentacles.

name: Vermillion Sparrow
description:
A fiery warrior
creature that
unleashes intense
heat from its body.

name: Crab Turtle
description:
A creature with a
turtle shell and
crab scissors to
provide high attack
and defense factors.

name: Garvas
description:
A malevolent
creature that
resembles a
winged lion.

name: Chakra
description: A twisting shape\nthat attacks with\ntentacle-like arms.

name: Kaiser Dragon
description: A very proud and\npowerful dragon\nemperor.

name: Dark Magician
description: The ultimate wizard \nin terms of attack\nand defense.

name: Seiyaryu
description:
A sacred dragon
that burns away
wickedness with its
mystical flames.

name: Two-headed King Rex
description: An unusual and\nrarely seen\ntwo-headed dragon.

name: Yubel - Terror Incarnate
description:
One of three
malicious spirits
that have sworn
to protect the
tomb of anubis

name: Yubel - Ultimate Nightmare
description:
Once a spellcaster
 tried to absorb
the power of the
spirit guardians.
In attempt to get
their powers he
accidentally merged
with one of them

name: Cyber Dragon
description:
A snakish machine
dragon who
was build as
one part of
something much
stronger

name: Malefic Cyber End Dragon
description:
A dreadful dragon
fused by three
seperate machine
dragons.

A sorcerer who lives
on the moon and
attacks opponents
with the power
of lunar light.

A child-like
creature that
controls a sleep
spirit to beckon
enemies into eternal
slumber.

This monster is
capable of
manipulating the
weather. This power
is the reason behind
the changing climate
of mountains.

A strange creature
with the head
of a fish and
the tentacles of
an octopus that
attacks its enemies
with spears.

A mystical chain
that is believed
capable of binding
its enemies and
preventing their
attacks.

Long arms reach out
from the Swamp
of Chaos to drag
in enemy creatures.
An ill-mannered\nfield mouse that\nchews on anything.

Attacks enemies with
fire-related spells,
such as the
"Sea of Flames"
and the
"Wall of Fire".

Controls the air
currents to create
violent winds and
tornadoes to blow
away its enemies.

A flashy,
black-caped thief
who wields
a magic cane.
The peacemaker\namong monsters.

A creature rumored
to turn enemies
into zombies
with a strange ray
that emanates
from its eyes.

Thousands of years
old, this frog
wizard attacks
enemies with an
army of tadpoles.

A weird temple
of skulls and bones
that sucks the
living essence
of all those who
dare approach it.

A living shadow
that dwells in the
realm of darkness.
It paralyzes
its enemies
to prevent attacks.

A warrior armed
with the Sword
of Crimson Flames.
Uses fire to bind
the movement
of its enemies.
A living spirit that\npreys on the living\nessence of enemies.

A living suit of
armor that attacks
enemies with a
bone-jarring tackle.

Stretching arms and
razor-sharp claws
make this monster a
formidable opponent.

A sea creature
with sharp teeth
that won't release
a victim once
they're locked on.

A lady warrior
drenched in the 
essence from
a thousand
battlefields.
A monstrous cat with\nwings and a long,\nstriking tail.

A creature made up
of several snakes
that attack
separately in battle.

A vile
warrior wizard
adept at casting
doom-dealing spells.

Controls air
currents and
can generate
a sudden gust
of wind to blow
away an opponent.

The appearance
of this creature
is preceded by the
ground melting under
an opponent's feet.

An amphibian warrior
that can easily
navigate beneath
the waters.
A fairy dedicated to\nprotecting fountains\nfrom pollution.
A mermaid sentry\nserving the Sea King\nand his kingdom.

This fast creature
can easily elude
enemy attacks and
counter them with
its vicious claws.

An inexperienced
witch who just
started learning
the mystic arts.
A rat\nthat is protected\nby armor-like fur.

A creature of the
night that attacks
enemies with its 
rocket-powered arms.

A lunar sorcerer
that uses mystical
spells to induce
hallucinations.

Serves as a double
for the ruler of the
Blue Flame. A master
swordsman that
wields a fine blade.
A messenger of\nnewborn life.
A fiery spirit\nthat burns anything\nin its path.
Not very useful\ndouble of a queen.

A bird that glows
with blue flames and
has a head of hair
shaped like a crown.

A protector
of the forest,
this massive tree
continues to grow.

A dinosaur with two
crushing jaws.
Stores electricity
in its horn and
releases high
voltage bolts
from the mouth
on its back.

A massive
sea serpent that
creates tidal waves
to wipe out
its enemies.

Swift and vicious,
this monster grabs
its victim with its
pincers and attacks
the captive with its
poison stinger.

A scheming queen
who covets
the king's throne
during his absence.
A lovely swordmaster\nwith some very\nagile moves.

This dragon wears a
shield not only for
its own protection
but also for ramming
its enemies.

A two-headed dragon
with a pair of
vicious jaws for
crushing its enemies.

A tank that races
around a labyrinth
hunting down
its enemies.

A master of monsters
that exercises
control over several
creatures.

Ryu-kishin enhanced
by the powers of
darkness. Very sharp
talons make it
a worthy opponent.

A monster formed by
the vengeful souls
of those who passed
away in battle.

Confuses enemy
monsters with noise
that is harsh
to the ears.
Attacks from the\nskies with\na whip-like tail.

name: Kunai with Chain
description: Upgrades fiends\nand warriors!

name: Magical Labyrinth
description: A card for boosting\nthe power of the\nLabyrinth Wall.

name: Warrior Elimination
description:
Destroys all
opponent Warrior
cards played
on the field.

name: Salamandra
description:
Whosoever holds
this sword, if he be
worthy shall posses
the power of the
flame swordsman

name: Cursebreaker
description:
Cancels the magic
over all 
level-reduced
monsters and sets
them at level 0.

name: Eternal Rest
description: Eliminates all\nZombie creatures.

name: Megamorph
description:
A card that
increases the power
of any selected
monster by 2 levels.

name: Metalmorph
description: A card that changes\nany selected monster\nto a Machine monster.

name: Winged Trumpeter
description: A horn that\nincreases the power\nof Fairy creatures.

name: Stain Storm
description: Acid rain destroys\nan opponent's\nMachine monsters.

name: Crush Card
description:
Opponent monsters
in play with attack
factors of 1500 or
more are eliminated.

name: Eradicating Aerosol
description:
An insecticide for
wiping out an
opponent's Insect
monsters that are
currently in play.

name: Breath of Light
description:
A magic wind that
reduces to rubble an
opponent's Rock
monsters that are
currently in play.

name: Eternal Draught
description:
A blast of heat
dries up
and eliminates
an opponent's Fish
monsters that are
currently in play.

name: Curse of Millennium Shield
description:
Sacrifices the
monster with the
highest defense 
rating and summons
Shield.

name: Yamadron Ritual
description:
Sacrifices
Beast-Warrior,
Dragon,
and Pyro monsters
to summon Yamadron.

name: Gate Guardian Ritual
description:
Sacrifices Kazejin,
Suijin, and Sanga of
the Thunder to
summon Gate Guardian.

name: Bright Castle
description: A glaring light that\nincreases the power\nof all monsters.

name: Shadow Spell
description:
Decreases an
opponent's in-play
monsters by two
levels.

name: Black Luster Ritual
description:
Ceremony conducted
to summon
Black Luster Soldier.
Sacrifice required.

name: Zera Ritual
description: Ceremony conducted\nto summon Zera.\nSacrifice required.

name: Harpie's Feather Duster
description: Destroys all\nopponent Magic cards\nthat are in play.

name: War-lion Ritual
description: Ceremony conducted\nto summon War Lion.\nSacrifice required.

name: Beastry Mirror Ritual
description:
Ceremony conducted
to summon
Fiend's Mirror.
Sacrifice required.

name: Ultimate Dragon
description: Sacrifice three\nBlue-eyes to summon\nUltimate Dragon.

name: Commencement Dance
description: Sacrifice Dancer and\nWarrior to summon\nPerformance of Sword.

name: Hamburger Recipe
description:
A card with
the ingredients
for making a
delicious hamburger.

name: Revival of Sennen Genjin
description:
Sacrifice
Beast-Warrior and
Golem to summon
Sengenjin.

name: Novox's Prayer
description:
Sacrifice Warrior
and Scythe Wielder
to summon
Skull Guardian.

name: Curse of Tri-Horned Dragon
description: Sacrifice a horned\nmonster to summon\nTri-Horned Dragon.

name: House of Adhesive Tape
description:
Monsters
with Attack Factors
of 500 or lower
are eliminated
from the play field.

name: Eatgaboon
description:
Monsters
with Attack Factors
of 1000 or lower
are eliminated
from the play field.

name: Bear Trap
description:
When an opposing
monster's Attack
Factor is
1500 or lower,
it is eliminated
from the play field.

name: Invisible Wire
description:
When an opposing
monster's Attack
Factor is
2000 or lower,
it is eliminated
from the play field.

name: Acid Trap Hole
description:
When an opposing
monster's Attack
Factor is
3000 or lower,
it is eliminated
from the play field.

name: Widespread Ruin
description:
When an opponent's
monster attacks,
it is blown to
smithereens and
eliminated from
the play field.

name: Goblin Fan
description:
Reflects the damage
of direct attack
cards like 
Fire Sparks and
Inferno back
to your opponent.

name: Bad Reaction to Simochi
description:
A card that reverses
the effects of
recovery cards and
transforms the
points to damage.

name: Reverse Trap
description:
A card that reverses
the effects of
power-up cards
and transforms 
the effects
to power reduction.

name: Fake Trap
description:
A trap card
for tricking
your opponent.
Nothing happens
when it is attacked.

name: Revived of Serpent Night Dragon
description:
Select a specific
monster for
sacrifice and summon
Serpent Night Dragon.

name: Turtle Oath
description: Sacrifice crab and\nturtle to summon\nCrab Turtle.

name: Contruct of Mask
description: Sacrifice a masked\none to summon a new\nmask.

name: Resurrection of Chakra
description:
Sacrifice 3 Fiend
monsters to conduct
the ritual for the
Resurrection of
Chakra.

name: Puppet Ritual
description: Sacrifice Puppeteer\nand Machine monsters\nto summon the Puppet.

name: Javelin Beetle Pact
description:
Sacrifice the stag
beetle and beetle
to summon
Javelin Beetle.

name: Garma Sword Oath
description:
Sacrifice the
Ashura's Arm
and Sword-wielder
to summon.

name: Cosmo Queen's Prayer
description: Sacrifice a normal\nQueen to summon\nCosmo Queen.

name: Revival of Skeleton Rider
description: Sacrifice Temple and\nCockroach to summon\nDokurorider.

name: Fortress Whale's Oath
description: Sacrifice Horn and\nMachine Fish to\nsummon Sea Fortress.
A warrior dancer\nwith fancy dance\nsteps.

Attracts hungry
enemies with tasty
aromas and eats them
when they get close
enough.

Armed with
a pair of shovels,
this creature is
a walking engine
of destruction.

A crab monster with
two massive scissors
for cutting up
enemies.

An unpredictable
creature that splits
into two and attacks
an enemy from
opposite directions.

An ammonite warrior
that has protected
the seas from the
dawn of time.

Know as a dweller
of the swamps,
this creature is a
minion of the Dark
forces.

A horned beaver
with wings that
throws high-velocity
acorns from the
sky with uncanny
accuracy.
A twisting shape\nthat attacks with\ntentacle-like arms.

A creature with a
turtle shell and
crab scissors to
provide high attack
and defense factors.

A dragon warrior
armed with a
crescent-shaped
sword. Rumored to be
from the moon.

Malicious spirits
that walk the world
of the living,
unable to find their
final resting place.

With the burning
hide of a meteorite,
this creature
vaporizes all that
it touches.

A heavenly stallion
that flies
across the skies
on scarlet wings.

A mysterious doll
with a strange dance
that robs the power
of opposing monsters.

A cannon-like
monster that rapidly
fires eyeballs
at the enemy.

An ugly, melting
creature that
breathes out
poison gas.

A sea monster with
a cannon mounted on
its back to blow
its enemies out
of the water.

A lonely rider that
races across the
wasteland, raising
thick clouds of dust.

A creature that
twists the fabric of
light and darkness
to generate images
to confuse opponents.

With a battle cry
that curdles
the blood of
its opponent,
this creature
attacks with its
massive beak.

A quick-moving and
tiny angel that's
very difficult
to hit.
